data.title: Dental Supplier Patterson Companies Is Up For Sale After Posting Mixed Q2 Earnings
data.description: Patterson Companies Q2 2025 results showed $1.67 billion in sales, a 1.3% increase, with updated EPS guidance and mixed performance across segments.

data.title: American Eagle Outfitters Stock Plunges: What's Going On?
data.description: American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. (NYSE: AEO) shares are trading lower Thursday. The company reported mixed third-quarter earnings and provided weak guidance for the holiday season. There has also been some analyst updates. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: Five Below Analysts Boost Their Forecasts After Upbeat Earnings
NANO Nuclear (NNE) Expands in Africa With Togo Deal: What's Going On?
data.description: Nano Nuclear Energy shares are trading lower by 2% during Thursday's session. The company earlier announced it signed a MOU with the Togolese Republic.

data.title: Korn Ferry Sees Revenue Dip Despite Beating Estimates, Guidance Underwhelms
data.description: Korn Ferry (NYSE: KFY) reports lower Q2 FY25 results with revenue down 4.3% Y/Y, but adjusted EBITDA and EPS increase. Company also increases dividend and repurchases shares.
